title: Call of Duty: Black Ops 7
anchor_summary: A near-future Call of Duty package centered on the Black Ops formula: cinematic/co-op campaign, fast competitive multiplayer, and Treyarch-style round-based Zombies with sci-fi mobility and progression.
expected_must_include_titles: Call of Duty: Black Ops II

similar_games.title: Call of Duty: Black Ops 6
similar_games.why_similar: Immediate series neighbor with the same all-in-one structure of campaign, competitive multiplayer, and Treyarch Zombies, plus shared near-future Black Ops gunplay and movement DNA.

similar_games.title: Call of Duty: Black Ops II
similar_games.why_similar: Direct narrative predecessor featuring David Mason and a near-future Black Ops setup built around covert warfare, futuristic weapons, and multiplayer-first FPS design.

similar_games.title: Call of Duty: Black Ops Cold War
similar_games.why_similar: Another Black Ops entry blending cinematic campaign, traditional multiplayer, and round-based Zombies in the same franchise-specific loop.

similar_games.title: Call of Duty: Black Ops III
similar_games.why_similar: Closest prior Black Ops comp for advanced movement, co-op campaign ambitions, futuristic arsenal, and Zombies as a major parallel mode.

similar_games.title: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare III
similar_games.why_similar: Comparable contemporary Call of Duty package with campaign, live-service multiplayer progression, and a major co-op side mode, even if its sub-brand tone differs.
